rules.rule: publication selection MUST cite a reviewer-approved variant_id; candidate / review-required / rejected variants are NEVER selectable.
selection MUST cite the visual_publication_build_id and placement_slot_id from layer 42.
selection MUST preserve grounding_id continuity (the variant's grounding_id MUST equal the placement's grounding_id).
auto-selection is FORBIDDEN. Selection MUST be reviewer-attributed.
selection records are append-only; replacing a selection requires explicit supersedence.
broken continuity, missing prompt lineage, or unresolved conflict BLOCKS selection (fail-closed).
